task:
/home/user/Documents/draft_diagram.odg is open in LibreOffice Draw — page 1 has four rectangles arranged vertically, labeled 'Box A', 'Box B', 'Box C', 'Box D' top-to-bottom.

On page 1:
- Replace the text in the 'Box A' rectangle with 'Input Stage'.
- Replace the text in the 'Box D' rectangle with 'Output Stage'.
- Leave the 'Box B' and 'Box C' rectangle texts unchanged.
- Add an ellipse with the text 'Processing' between the 'Box B' and 'Box C' rectangles.
- Page 1 must end up with exactly 5 shapes.

Add a second page containing a single rectangle with the text 'Revision Notes'. The document must end up with exactly 2 pages.

Save the file in-place.

verification.description: Page 1 contains text 'Input Stage' (renamed from Box A)
Page 1 contains text 'Output Stage' (renamed from Box D)
